intended_use: DeepRhythmAI is a cloud-based software for the assessment of cardiac arrhythmias using two lead ECG data in adult patients. It is intended for use by a healthcare solution integrator to build web, mob
intended_use_full: DeepRhythmAI is a cloud-based software for the assessment of cardiac arrhythmias using two lead ECG data in adult patients. It is intended for use by a healthcare solution integrator to build web, mobile or another types of applications to let qualified healthcare professionals review and confirm the analytic result. The product supports downloading and analyzing data recorded in the compatible formats from dedicated ambulatory ECG devices such as Holter, event recorder, Outpatient Cardiac Telemetry devices or other similar recorders when the assessment of the rhythm is necessary.
target_condition: Cardiac arrhythmias (including atrial fibrillation, ventricular ectopic beats, supraventricular ectopic beats, non-paced ventricular arrhythmias)
ground_truth: ANSI/AAMI EC57:2012 and ANSI/AAMI/IEC 60601-2-47:2012/(R)2016 standards; proprietary MDG validation database
